agreement.title: Navio Go Wallet – Agreement
agreement.betaWarningTitle: This app is in beta. Use at your own risk.
agreement.betaPoint1: Navio is currently in testnet phase. Do not use real funds.
agreement.betaPoint2: Unexpected bugs, data loss, or connectivity issues may occur at any time.
agreement.betaPoint3: You assume full responsibility for any loss or damage resulting from use of this software.
agreement.description: This Agreement governs your use of Navio Go Wallet. By continuing, you confirm that you understand and accept the terms outlined below.
agreement.nonCustodial: Navio Go Wallet is a non-custodial digital wallet. Your private keys and recovery phrase are generated and stored exclusively on your device.
agreement.noAccess: We do not store, access, or recover them.
agreement.responsibility: You are solely responsible for safeguarding your wallet, recovery phrase, device security, and all activities performed using the application. Loss of access credentials may result in permanent and irreversible loss of digital assets.
agreement.notFinancial: Navio Go Wallet does not act as a financial institution, exchange, broker, or custodian and does not provide financial, investment, legal, or tax advice.
agreement.blockchain: All transactions are executed directly on blockchain networks. Once confirmed, transactions are irreversible. Network fees, delays, or failures are determined by the blockchain and are outside of Navio's control.
agreement.liability: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Navio Go Wallet shall not be liable for any loss of funds, data, profits, or damages arising from the use or inability to use the application, including but not limited to user error, device compromise, or third-party failures.
agreement.acceptTerms: By tapping "I Accept", you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to this Agreement and assume full responsibility for your use of Navio Go Wallet.

backup.title: Backup Wallet
backup.warning: Never share your recovery phrase. Anyone with these words can access your funds.
backup.description: Your 12-word recovery phrase is the only way to restore your wallet.
backup.seedDescription: Advanced: your master seed key in hex format.
